{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Visiria Subline
| introduced = The Knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Visiria Subline]] is a location where public opinion can be improved.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c14">''The Knight'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|It is difficult to get a signal from the Visirian [[Subline]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c28">''The Knight'', chapter 28</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
